name: @levnikolaevich/hex-ssh-mcp
description: Token-efficient SSH MCP server with hash-verified file operations. 6 tools: remote-ssh, ssh-read-lines, ssh-edit-block, ssh-search-code, ssh-write-chunk, ssh-verify.

scripts.benchmark: node -e "console.error('hex-ssh-mcp does not publish a comparative workflow benchmark yet. Run npm run benchmark:diagnostic for normalization diagnostics.'); process.exit(1)"

_dep_notes.zod: Pinned ^3.25.0: zod 4 breaks zod-to-json-schema (used by MCP SDK internally). Tool parameter descriptions not sent to clients. Revisit when MCP SDK switches to z.toJSONSchema().

author: Lev Nikolaevich <https://github.com/levnikolaevich>
